shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/skills/.system/nowledge-mem/working-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'! .git'"' | head -50 && printf '\\n--- root ---\\n' && ls -la"

/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- skill ---' && sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/working-memory/SKILL.md && printf '%s\\n' '--- files ---' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' | head -50 && printf '%s\\n' '--- root ---' && ls -la"
/bin/bash -lc "find app -maxdepth 3 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,240p' {} \\; && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' package.json && printf '\\n--- git ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "notification preference Server Action refresh current page" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' AGENTS.md && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,120p' next.config.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/distill-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- diff ---\\n' && git diff -- app/actions.ts app/page.tsx tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In the minimal Next.js App Router settings scaffold, notification preference state is stored in an HTTP-only notifications-enabled cookie because no database or authentication layer exists. The page reads the cookie server-side, and the toggle Server Action updates it then calls refresh() from next/cache so the current route re-renders without redirecting." -t "Notification toggle uses cookie and refresh" --unit-type decision -l label_nextjs -l label_notifications -s codex -i 0.7'
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba app/actions.ts && printf '\\n' && nl -ba app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- tsconfig tail ---\\n' && sed -n '1,140p' tsconfig.json"
